div.p: Parse log record at current_lsn Extract: page_id, offset, new_value Extract: record.lsn from header
buffer_pool_get_page(page_id) Load from disk if not cached
page_lsn = page->header.page_lsn This is the LSN of the last modification applied to this page

ul.li: page_lsn indicates a later or equal modification

div.p: Record that this change is now applied:
page->is_dirty = true Will be flushed to disk at end of Redo phase
Scenario: Recovery runs twice First recovery:

ul.li: page_lsn updated to 1000 Second recovery (after another crash):

div.p: CRITICAL: pageLSN is ALWAYS updated after applying a change. This enables recovery to be run multiple times with identical results.
